nasb.text: And Jesus answered him, “Simon, I have something to say to you.” And he replied, “Say it, Teacher.”

esv.text: And Jesus answering said to him, “Simon, I have something to say to you.” And he answered, “Say it, Teacher.”

cnv.text: 耶穌對他說：“西門，我有句話要對你說。”他說：“老師，請說。”

ccb.text: 耶稣对他说：“西门，我有话跟你说。” 西门答道：“老师，请说。”

csbs.text: 耶稣对他说：“西门，我有话要对你说。” 西门说：“老师，请说。”
